_comment: Weekly candidate pool for future Ageimals rounds. Each candidate is a real animal with a cited source. 'used' animals have already been built into a round host sheet and should not be suggested again. Keep 3-5 entries with used=false at all times — top up with fresh finds when the active count drops below 3.

candidates.name: Unnamed gorilla calf
candidates.hook: Only the second gorilla ever born at the Detroit Zoo, to first-time mom Tulivu and dad Mshindi — half-sibling to 2024's Motema.

candidates.name: Unnamed leopard cub
candidates.hook: The first Amur leopard ever born at the zoo in its 144-year history, to mom Marta and dad Sylas.

candidates.name: Unnamed red panda twins
candidates.hook: First-time parents Ruby and Raj's twin cubs are the first red pandas born at the zoo since 1993.

candidates.name: Unnamed langur baby
candidates.born: 2026-07 (early July, exact date TBD from source)
candidates.hook: Born to mom Ravalina and dad Chay with the species' signature bright-orange baby fur, which fades to adult black-and-white over several months — endangered species.
